caption: A woman with shoulder-length brown hair and red-rimmed glasses stands behind a dark podium, speaking at an event. She is wearing a black sleeveless top and a large, gold-toned chunky necklace. Behind her, a beige wall features the "UNITED STATES INSTITUTE OF PEACE" logo and text. A blue banner with "STITU" is partially visible on the left side of the frame. A blue lower-third graphic appears in the first frame, identifying her as "Melanie Greenberg," with the titles "President & CEO" and "Alliance for Peacebuilding." As the scene progresses, she shifts her gaze from the audience down toward her notes on the podium and then back up. She uses hand gestures to emphasize her points, moving her arms and palms outward as she speaks. The lighting remains consistent, and the camera maintains a medium shot of the woman throughout the sequence.
